# SEO Audit

## Summary

- Exported HTML routes audited: 1406
- Indexable routes: 1404
- Noindex routes: 2
- Broken internal links found: 0
- Sitemap URL count: 1404

## Risk Summary

- Canonical domain is standardized on `https://www.opentoolskit.com`.
- Root `/` is now a noindex locale handoff page and no longer competes with `/en`.
- Category filter query links were retired in favor of crawlable category hub routes.
- Duplicate-content risk remains mainly on long-tail tool pages still using fallback SEO copy.
- Sitemap coverage now matches canonical localized pages only; utility routes are excluded.

## Priority Recommendations

- Keep extending dedicated SEO overrides for high-intent tools that still fall back to generic titles.
- Add non-PDF guides and collections only when the actual tools land, to avoid thin or misleading content.
- Preserve the category hub and related-path graph; it is now the main internal-link spine for crawling and cannibalization control.
